name: Last-Minute Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
1. In a bowl, combine dry ingredients; cut in the butter until crumbly.
2. Beat the egg and milk; stir into flour mixture.
3. Spoon batter into five individual microwave-safe 4 oz. custard cups.
4. Place all of the cups in the microwave at once and cook on medium for 3 minutes.
5. Cook on high for 2-3 minutes or until the cakes test done with a wooden pick.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature with strawberries and whipped cream.
